data.name: Surviving the Apocalypse Is More Fun When There’s Sex
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to a world where survival and desire intertwine in Surviving the Apocalypse Is More Fun When There’s Sex, an adult visual novel set in a post-apocalyptic wasteland where every decision could mean the difference between life and death.



In a world ravaged by chaos and despair, you take on the role of a rugged survivor, braving the dangers of a desolate landscape overrun by raiders, mutants, and sinister factions vying for control. But amidst the ruins, a glimmer of hope emerges when you rescue a woman from the clutches of marauders, igniting a passionate partnership forged in the fires of adversity.



Together, you'll navigate the treacherous terrain of moral ambiguity, confronting ethical dilemmas that challenge your principles and test the limits of your humanity. Will you succumb to the darkness that lurks within, or will you rise above the chaos to become a beacon of hope in a world on the brink of oblivion?



But survival isn't the only thing on the line. As you traverse the wasteland with your newfound companion, you'll discover that desire burns hot amidst the ashes of civilisation. With the right choices and a bit of charm, you'll unlock intimate encounters that explore the depths of passion and pleasure, offering a tantalising glimpse of paradise amidst the ruins.

Featuring:

  • A gripping narrative: Immerse yourself in a captivating story filled with twists, turns, and moral quandaries that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
  • Dynamic characters: Forge meaningful connections with a diverse cast of characters, each with their own desires, motivations, and secrets waiting to be uncovered.
  • Choices that matter: Your decisions shape the course of the story, leading to multiple branching paths and endings that reflect the consequences of your actions.
  • Steamy encounters: Indulge your senses with erotic scenes that push the boundaries of desire, offering an intimate exploration of passion and pleasure in a world where every moment counts.

data.short_description: Embark on a perilous journey through a post-apocalyptic wasteland, where survival is paramount and moral choices shape your fate. Forge deep connections and explore the depths of desire amidst the chaos of a world on the brink of collapse.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 3500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 3500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 3500 MB 可用空間
